title: Generator CLI
content:
# Generator CLI

---

## Commands

| Command | Description |
|------|------|
| `kecare gen <path>` | Build the site and generate page files |
| `kecare -version` | Check the current version |

---

## Usage Examples

```bash
kecare gen .                    # 当前目录
kecare gen ./Kecare-theme       # 相对路径
kecare gen /home/user/theme     # 绝对路径
```

---

## Execution Flow

1. Scan Markdown files under `.kecare/articles/`
2. Parse Front Matter and main content
3. Execute translation (if `translate` is configured)
4. Run `*.article.ts` and `*.list.ts` to generate pages
5. Output files to the specified directory
